title: Lock down mass assignment with strong parameters
description: Permit only the attributes a request may set so users cannot assign protected columns by passing extra params.
body: Use when a controller builds or updates a model from request params. Do not pass raw params to create/update or permit a whole hash blindly. Actions: in the controller require the model key and permit an explicit allowlist of attributes (params.require(:user).permit(:name, :email)), and never permit role/admin/owner-style columns from user input. Validation signals include a request spec asserting that a forbidden attribute supplied by the client is ignored and the column is unchanged. Risk boundary: permitting all params lets a user escalate privilege or overwrite ownership columns; an over-broad permit on a security-relevant model is a blocking finding to tighten.
